name: Woody Sort
author: Poki
description: Woody Sort is a color matching sorting game in which you have to sort out all the colored balls. Make sure each tube only contains balls of one color in order to win and go to the next level! Each level has three challenges attached to it that you can complete. Complete them all to gain a 3-star rating! Don't worry if you get stuck, you can always ask for a helpful hint! Can you sort them all? How to play Woody Sort? Use the mouse to sort the balls! Who created Woody Sort? Woody Sort was created by Unico Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Brain Test All-Star , 248 Number Connect and Word City Crossed ! How can I play Woody Sort for free? You can play Woody Sort for free on Poki. Can I play Woody Sort on mobile devices and desktop? Woody Sort can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
